===={{g|Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire}}====
Steven will always send out {{p|Metagross}} last and [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolve]] it at the first opportunity.
=====First [[Multi Battle]] with {{player}}=====
Steven will work as the player's partner during the Multi Battle against [[Courtney]] and a {{tc|Team Magma Grunt}}{{sup/6|OR}}/[[Matt]] and a {{tc|Team Aqua Grunt}}{{sup/6|AS}} on [[Southern Island]].

{{Party
| background = {{steel color}}
| border = {{steel color dark}}
| headcolor = {{steel color light}}
| sprite = VSSteven.png{{!}}150px
| prize = none
| name = Steven
| location = Southern Island
| game = ORAS
| pokemon = 1
}}

=====Second [[Multi Battle]] with {{player}}=====
